headline: Applied Materials At 42x: Boom Or Bubble?
summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock surged 150% over the last twelve months, with its P/E multiple rocketing from 19.1x to 42.2x on a trailing basis. Yet full-year revenue grew a mere 2.1%. What's happening.

headline: US Export Curbs On Hua Hong Test Applied Materials China Exposure
summary: The US Department of Commerce has ordered Applied Materials and other US chip equipment suppliers to halt certain tool shipments to Chinese chipmaker Hua Hong. The move targets Hua Hong, China's second largest contract chip manufacturer, and tightens existing export controls on semiconductor production tools. The new restrictions add fresh pressure to Applied Materials' international business, particularly its exposure to the Chinese semiconductor market. Applied Materials, traded as...

headline: Erste Group Upgrades Applied Materials (AMAT) on AI-Driven Semiconductor Investment
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) has posted YTD gains of 50.5% as of April 27, putting it among the 10 Large-Cap Stocks that are on Fire Right Now.
